CreateLandingZone.description: Grants permission to create a landing zone

CreateManagedAccount.description: Grants permission to create an account managed by AWS Control Tower

DeleteLandingZone.description: Grants permission to delete AWS Control Tower landing zone

DeregisterManagedAccount.description: Grants permission to deregister an account created through the account factory from AWS Control Tower

DeregisterOrganizationalUnit.description: Grants permission to deregister an organizational unit from AWS Control Tower management

DescribeAccountFactoryConfig.description: Grants permission to describe the current account factory configuration

DescribeCoreService.description: Grants permission to describe resources managed by core accounts in AWS Control Tower

DescribeGuardrail.description: Grants permission to describe a guardrail

DescribeGuardrailForTarget.description: Grants permission to describe a guardrail for a organizational unit

DescribeLandingZoneConfiguration.description: Grants permission to describe the current Landing Zone configuration

DescribeManagedAccount.description: Grants permission to describe an account created through account factory

DescribeManagedOrganizationalUnit.description: Grants permission to describe an AWS Organizations organizational unit managed by AWS Control Tower

DescribeRegisterOrganizationalUnitOperat.description: Grants permission to describe a Register Organizational Unit Operation

DescribeSingleSignOn.description: Grants permission to describe the current AWS Control Tower IAM Identity Center configuration

DisableBaseline.description: Grants permission to disable a Baseline on a target

DisableControl.description: Grants permission to remove a control from an organizational unit

DisableGuardrail.description: Grants permission to disable a guardrail from an organizational unit

EnableBaseline.description: Grants permission to enable a Baseline on a target

EnableControl.description: Grants permission to activate a control for an organizational unit

EnableGuardrail.description: Grants permission to enable a guardrail to an organizational unit

GetAccountInfo.description: Grants permission to describe an account email and validate that it exists

GetAvailableUpdates.description: Grants permission to list available updates for the current AWS Control Tower deployment

GetBaseline.description: Grants permission to get Baseline details

GetBaselineOperation.description: Grants permission to get the current status of a particular Baseline operation

GetControlOperation.description: Grants permission to get the current status of a particular EnabledControl or DisableControl operation

GetEnabledBaseline.description: Grants permission to get an enabled Baseline

GetEnabledControl.description: Grants permission to get an enabled control from an organizational unit

GetGuardrailComplianceStatus.description: Grants permission to get the current compliance status of a guardrail

GetHomeRegion.description: Grants permission to get the home region of the AWS Control Tower setup

GetLandingZone.description: Grants permission to get the current status of the landing zone setup

GetLandingZoneDriftStatus.description: Grants permission to get the current landing zone drift status

GetLandingZoneOperation.description: Grants permission to get the current status of a particular landing zone operation

GetLandingZoneStatus.description: Grants permission to get the current status of the landing zone setup

ListControlOperations.description: Grants permission to list all control operations

ListDirectoryGroups.description: Grants permission to list the current directory groups available through IAM Identity Center

ListDriftDetails.description: Grants permission to list occurrences of drift in AWS Control Tower

ListEnabledBaselines.description: Grants permission to list enabled Baselines

ListEnabledControls.description: Grants permission to list all enabled controls in a specified organizational unit

ListEnabledGuardrails.description: Grants permission to list currently enabled guardrails

ListExtendGovernancePrecheckDetails.description: Grants permission to list Precheck details for an Organizational Unit

ListExternalConfigRuleCompliance.description: Grants permission to list the compliance of external AWS Config rules

ListGuardrailViolations.description: Grants permission to list existing guardrail violations

ListGuardrails.description: Grants permission to list all available guardrails

ListGuardrailsForTarget.description: Grants permission to list guardrails and their current state for a organizational unit

ListLandingZoneOperations.description: Grants permission to list all landing zone operations

ListLandingZones.description: Grants permission to list all landing zones

ListManagedAccounts.description: Grants permission to list accounts managed through AWS Control Tower

ListManagedAccountsForGuardrail.description: Grants permission to list managed accounts with a specified guardrail applied

ListManagedAccountsForParent.description: Grants permission to list managed accounts under an organizational unit

ListManagedOrganizationalUnits.description: Grants permission to list organizational units managed by AWS Control Tower

ListManagedOrganizationalUnitsForGuardra.description: Grants permission to list managed organizational units that have a specified guardrail applied

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags for a resource

ManageOrganizationalUnit.description: Grants permission to set up an organizational unit to be managed by AWS Control Tower

PerformPreLaunchChecks.description: Grants permission to perform validations in an account

ResetEnabledBaseline.description: Grants permission to reset an enabled Baseline

ResetEnabledControl.description: Grants permission to reset an enabled control for an organizational unit

ResetLandingZone.description: Grants permission to reset a landing zone

SetupLandingZone.description: Grants permission to set up or update AWS Control Tower landing zone

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a resource

UpdateAccountFactoryConfig.description: Grants permission to update the account factory configuration

UpdateEnabledBaseline.description: Grants permission to update an enabled Baseline

UpdateEnabledControl.description: Grants permission to update an enabled control for an organizational unit

UpdateLandingZone.description: Grants permission to update a landing zone

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
